reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 비온 뒤 축축한~~잔디 위에서 놀게될 것 같아서 언더커버 입혀서 애카 다녀왔어요~!! 발목 부분 찍찍이로 더 핏하게 조절 가능한 부분도 좋고, 등판은 메쉬망으로 되어있어 통기성이 좋은 것도 맘에 들어요!! 애카에서 이 제품 뭔지 물어보는 보호자분들에게 기분좋게 소개하고 추천하구 왔어요~! 앞으로 더 비 자주 올 것 같은데 이번 여름 자주 입히게 될 것 같아요..! 비가오나 눈이 오나 산책 자주 나가야하는 실외배변견 키우는 견주분들 이거 하나 장만하세요..!! 짱꿀템입니다,,,
reviews.content_en: After the rain, the grass was all wet~~ so I put the UNDERCOVER on Acka and took her out~!! I love how the ankle part has velcro for a snug fit, and the back is made of mesh so it breathes really well!! I happily introduced and recommended this product to other pet parents asking about it at the park~! It looks like it'll rain a lot more this summer, so I think I'll be using this often..! If you have an outdoor pup that needs frequent walks whether it's raining or snowing, you definitely need to get one of these..!! It's seriously such a gem,,,

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
#체험단 
5XL 착용/ 몸무게 23kg, 목둘레 45cm, 가슴둘레 75cm, 등길이 53cm
언더커버 올인원 라이트그레이 색상 실물 너무 예뻐요!
비 올 땐 레인코트랑 세트로 입혔더니 완벽커버돼서 좋았고  
비 온 뒤엔 언더커버만 입혔는데 항상 흙투성이가 되던 배랑 다리가 커버돼서 산책 후 닦이는 시간이 훨씬 단축됐어요.
신축성이 있어서 탈착도 편하고 여름에도 입힐 수 있는 소재라는 점이 아주 맘에 듭니다!
생활방수 원단이라 오염도 쉽게 닦여서 관리도 편해요.
태풍이 와도 산책 나가는 무조건 실외배변견이라 이번 여름에 아주 유용하게 입힐 거 같아요!
reviews.content_en:
#review
5XL fit / Weight 23kg, Neck circumference 45cm, Chest circumference 75cm, Back length 53cm
The UNDERCOVER all-in-one in light gray looks so beautiful in person!
When it rained, I wore it as a set with a rain coat and it provided perfect coverage, which was great. After the rain, when I only wore the UNDERCOVER, my pup's belly and legs that used to get all muddy were now covered, so cleanup time after walks got so much shorter.
I love that it has elasticity for easy on-and-off, and the material is suitable for summer wear too!
Since it's water-resistant fabric, dirt wipes off easily so maintenance is super convenient.
Since my pup is an outdoor pottier who goes out even during typhoons, I think this will be really useful to wear all summer!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
#체험단

말티푸 5키로 / 목24cm 가슴40cm 등30cm
라지사이즈 잘 맞았어요!!

1️⃣ 여름에도 덥지 않은 우비
 등부분이 메쉬 소재라 안 답답하고 올인원인데도 더운 느낌 없어서 여름에 비 온 뒤에 산책하기 좋았어요

2️⃣ 체형 맞게 조절되는 핏
등쪽 스토퍼로 길이 조절되니까 핏이 잘 맞았어요

3️⃣ 디테일 좋은 다리 부분
벨크로로 딱 맞게 조절이 돼서 안쪽에 오염이 덜 했어요

비올땐 산책을 못 나가고 비가 그치면 나가는데 온몸이 축축해서 돌아오면 샤워시키기 너무 귀찮긴 했거든요 ㅜ 그렇다고 여름에
우비는 더울것같고 또 다른옷을 입히기엔 오염이 심해졌는데
이지피지 올인원은 여름에 입히기 딱 좋은 것 같아요 
산책 후 발이랑 세수만 하면 돼서 너무 좋았어요!!
reviews.content_en:
#review
Maltipoo 5kg / Neck 24cm Chest 40cm Back 30cm
Large size fits perfectly!!

1️⃣ A rain jacket that's not too hot even in summer
The back is mesh material so it's not stuffy, and even though it's an all-in-one, it doesn't feel hot, so it's perfect for walking after rain in summer

2️⃣ Fit that adjusts to your dog's body shape
The stopper on the back lets you adjust the length so the fit is great

3️⃣ Nice details on the leg part
The velcro adjusts perfectly so there's less dirt on the inside

When it rains I can't take walks, and when it stops I go out but she comes back all wet, so bathing her is such a hassle ㅜ And I thought a rain jacket would be too hot in summer, and other clothes would get too dirty. But the EASY PEASY all-in-one seems perfect for summer! I just rinse her paws and face after a walk and that's it, which is so great!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
선물처럼 비가올때 받게되어서 아주유용하게 입혔어요~
아주 약간의 신축성으로 입혔을때 불편해하지않았고
메쉬망으로 통풍도 되어 비가와도 뽀송했어요
다리부분은 찍찍이로 조절가능해서 신발신고 철통으로 비에서 차단하고 산책 다녀왔습니다~ ㅎㅎ(저희애는 다리가 길어서 차단이 안되는 부분도 있긴했는데 그래도 괜찮았어요~)
세트인 겉옷을 사면 더 완벽할꺼같습니다^^
색상은 머스타드라 조금 어두웠지만 그래도 병아리 우비느낌 살포 내봤어요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
It arrived like a gift right when it rained, so I used it very well~
With just a little bit of stretch, it wasn't uncomfortable when wearing it, and the mesh material lets it breathe, so even in the rain it stayed dry~
The leg parts have velcro for adjustment, so we can seal it up tight and go for walks in the rain~ ㅎㅎ (My pup has long legs so there were some parts that didn't fully block, but it was still okay~)
I think it would be even more perfect if you buy the matching outer coat^^  The color is mustard so it was a bit dark, but it still gave off cute chick rain jacket vibes ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 이지피지 바디커버를 입혀보고 너무 만족해서 언더커버 #체험단 응모했는데 운 좋게 당첨되었어요🫶🏻

촐랭이는 8kg 가슴둘레48 등길이37인데 2xl사이즈 예쁘게 잘맞아요! 촐랭이 몸에 딱 맞춘 듯한 사이즈예요

실외배변 하는 아이라 비가오나 눈이오나 꼭 나가야 하는데
비 그치고 입히고 나가니 잔디밭에서도 다리와 배가 안 젖어서 너무 좋았어요!!😆
몸 젖는 거 싫어하는 강아지에게도, 꼬질해진 강아지 닦고 말려줘야 하는 보호자에게도 꼭 필요한 아이템인 거 같아요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I was so satisfied with BITE ME's EASY PEASY body cover that I entered the UNDERCOVER #review giveaway, and luckily I won! 🫶🏻

Jolrang weighs 8kg with 48cm chest circumference and 37cm back length, and the 2XL size fits so prettily! It fits Jolrang's body perfectly!

Since my pup does outdoor potty, I have to go out whether it rains or snows, but now that I wear this when going out after rain, her legs and belly don't get wet even on the grass, which is so great!!😆 It's such a necessary item for dogs who don't like getting wet, and for pet parents who have to clean and dry their dirty pups ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
#체험단 
디스크가 터져서 뒷다리가 불편한 강아지라 산책시마다 뒷다리가 항상 엉망이 되는데요ㅠ
밑부분이 방수커버로 되어있어 깨끗한 강아지 다리로 산책을 다닐 수 있게 되었어요! 
등부분은 매쉬 소재라 통풍도 잘되고 해충 방지도 될 것 같아요!
소매 부분에 스트랩이 있어 조절도 가능하고 너무 편리하고 좋아요!
비가 오지 않을 때에는 해충방지용으로 입히고 비가 내릴 때는 우비 아래에 입히려고요
내일 비가 온다는데 비오는 날에 입혀서 산책 다녀와보려고요!
reviews.content_en:
#review
My dog has a herniated disc so her hind legs are uncomfortable, and her legs always get messy after every walk ㅠ
But now that the bottom part is covered with water-resistant material, I can take her for walks with clean legs!
The back part is mesh material so it breathes well and I think it'll help prevent insects too!
There are straps on the sleeves for adjustment and it's so convenient and great!
When it's not raining, I'll use it for insect prevention, and when it rains, I'll put it under a rain coat
It's supposed to rain tomorrow, so I'm planning to wear it and take a walk in the rain!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
실외배변을 하면서 우비를 사줘야지 마음먹고 정말 많은 후기를 본뒤 구매했는데 징짜 너무 귀엽고 맘에 쏙 들어요!!❤️
머리가 작아서 모자 맞는게 없었는데 머리 고정 잘되는게 제일 맘에 든 부분이고,
바스락거리는데도 굳을까봐 걱정했는데 잘 걸어서 다행이예요..!💜
디자인도 너무 귀염뽀짝하고 넘 심쿵••••💛
내일 여행가는데 마침 비가와서 야무지게 챙겨가용🩵
reviews.content_en:
I decided I needed to get a rain jacket for outdoor pottying and looked at so many reviews before buying, and it's seriously so cute and I love it so much!!❤️
My pup has a small head so hats never fit, but what I love most is that the headstrap stays in place really well,
I was worried the crinkling sound would scare her, but she walks well thankfully..!💜
The design is so adorable and I'm totally smitten••••💛
I'm going on a trip tomorrow and it just happens to rain, so I'm packing this along 🩵

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content: 평소 입는 사이즈는 L 인데 M을 주문해서 조금 작나 하는 느낌은 있지만 재질도 좋고~~ 입고 나가면 닦는것도 훨씬 편하고 넘 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I usually wear size L, but I ordered size M and it does feel a bit small, but the material is nice~~ and it's so much easier to clean when I take it off, it's great!

reviews.name: 혜****
reviews.content:
톤다운된 노란색이라 부담없고 예쁘네요
궁금해서 사봤는데 여름에 입기좋을정도로 얇고 통풍이잘되는소재같아요 
4.3키로고 바잇미꺼는 m입히는데 딱 잘맞아요
다리가 안좋아서 다리껴서 입는건 좀 주저하게되는데 입히고벗길때 그렇게 불편하지않았어요
reviews.content_en:
The toned-down yellow color is unobtrusive and pretty
I was curious so I bought it, and it seems like a thin material that breathes well for wearing in summer
My pup is 4.3kg and I wear BITE ME size M which fits perfectly
My pup has weak legs so I was hesitant about the leg covering, but it wasn't that uncomfortable putting it on and taking it off

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 올해 비가 많이 온다고 해서 기존에 가지고 있는 바잇미 판초우의랑 같이 입히려고 샀어요! 등이 매쉬라 덜 더울 거 같더라구요 다리도 찍찍이로 조절이 되서 좋고 등길이 딱 맞춰서 조일 수 있어서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: I heard there'd be a lot of rain this year, so I bought this to wear together with my existing BITE ME poncho rain jacket! Since the back is mesh it should be less hot. I also love that the legs have velcro for adjustment and the back length can be adjusted to fit perfectly!

reviews.name: 껌****
reviews.content: 젖는거 시러 하는 강아지를 위해샀어용~ 비올때나 잔디밭 갈때 좋을거같아용
reviews.content_en: I bought it for my pup who hates getting wet~ I think it'll be great for when it rains or when walking on grass~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 암컷용으로 배쪽 좀 더 가려지게 따로 나와도 좋을것 같아요
reviews.content_en: For female dogs, it would be nice if there was a separate option that covers the belly area a bit more
